10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve retrofit kit, SV / DV valves become SCV
10.evidenceText: Sale price: €7.90 Regular price: €9.95. Sale price: €4.90 Regular price: €5.99
10.extractionRationale: Four prices found from Source 1 (ebike24.com): €4.90, €5.99, €7.90, €9.95. Median of these four prices = (€5.99 + €7.90) / 2 = €6.945, rounded to €6.95

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - schwarz | 80 mm | 2 Stück | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: 5 unique product page URLs identified: p1993548 (80mm schwarz), p1993546 (40mm schwarz), p1993547 (60mm schwarz), p1993550 (60mm Kupfer), p1993549 (40mm Kupfer)
27.extractionRationale: Counted all 5 provided source URLs as distinct CoreCap product listings. Each URL represents a unique product page with different specifications (varying lengths: 40mm, 60mm, 80mm and colors: schwarz/black, Kupfer/copper). No duplicates or accessories detected.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - copper | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: All three product listings contain only product descriptions and features. No stock status information (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) is present in any of the provided content snippets.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text. The content includes only product descriptions, features, and navigation elements with no availability or stock status indicators mentioned.

56.evidenceText: Sources provide information about Clik Valve technology and valve products (SKU 3531, 3532) but do not list any specific inner tube models or SKUs that use the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence discusses Clik Valve technology and lists valve products themselves (3531, 3532), but does not provide data on distinct Schwalbe inner tube models/SKUs featuring the Clik valve interface. The sources focus on the valve technology rather than inner tube product models.

61.evidenceText: the LME Official Price is the global benchmark price for aluminium, 25 tonnes Price quotation: US$ per tonne
61.extractionRationale: Source 1 confirms LME Aluminium is quoted in US$ per tonne but does not provide an actual current price value. Source 2 shows 3450.00 for Aluminium Alloy (not pure aluminum). Source 3 shows premium prices, not spot prices. No explicit current spot price is stated in the evidence.
